summarization.a: The figure displays XPS survey spectra for Y2O3 films depositied via thermal H2O, O2 palsma and H2O palsma, confirming the presence of O and Y.
summarization.b: The figure displays the XP-spectra of Y3d core level for Y2O3 films depositied via thermal H2O, O2 palsma and H2O palsma.
summarization.c: TThe figure displays the XP-spectra of O1s  core level for Y2O3 films depositied via thermal H2O, O2 palsma and H2O palsma, confirming the presence of O and Y.
